title: Tab Gamemode
description:
Tab Gamemode [Fabric]

Tab Gamemode is a lightweight and useful Minecraft mod that adds a gamemode indicator for every player directly to the player list (Tab menu).
body:
Tab Gamemode is a lightweight and useful Minecraft mod that adds a gamemode indicator for every player directly to the player list (Tab menu).

    Instant Visualization: A compact text tag representing the player's current mode is displayed right next to their ping.

Color Coding

    [S] - Survival (Green)
    [C] - Creative (Gold)
    [A] - Adventure (Gray)
    [Sp] - Spectator (Aqua)
